channel.title: art on dcb.lu
channel.description: Recent content in art on dcb.lu

item.title: Hail to the Red, Wäiss, and Blauw
item.description: First, A Few Fun Flag Facts Luxembourg and the Netherlands have nearly identical flags, save for two differences: a slightly different proportion1 and a different blue for the bottom stripe. I recent started wondering, though, how different are they? The definition of Luxembourg’s blue is fairly straightforward. Because no one had really bothered to make the flag official for about a century, the precise definition of the flag wasn’t written until 1993 and used Pantone to define its colors, which are then pretty easy to look up sRGB values for.
